name: nsdi-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for NSDI submissions: networked-systems venue fit, the twice-a-year deadline calendar, HotCRP submission audits, one-shot revise-and-resubmit handling, deployment-grade evaluation, artifact badges and the Community Award, and USENIX open-access final papers. Grounded in the NSDI '27 and NSDI '26 official pages checked on 2026-07-08.
